titleStmt.title: SII 9.638: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 638. (A.R. No. 339 of 1926.) ON A STONE PLANTED BEFORE THE HANUMAN TEMPLE AT KANAGANIPALLE, DHARMAVARAM TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This damaged inscription is dated Śaka 1472, Sādhāraṇa, Bhādrapada, śu. 15, corresponding to A.D. 1550 August 27, Wednesday (not verifiable), in the reign of Sadāśivarāya-Mahārāya. It records that Kāḍavīra, a Liṁgadhara (Liṅgayat) of Ānegondi made a grant of the Liṅgadeṟige payable by the Liṅgadhārins of Kanakagoṇḍanahaḷḷi, belonging to the nāyakatana of Rāmarājayya, to god Vīrēśvaradēva of the village for dīpārādhane.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrījayābhyudayaśālivāhana
śakavaruṣaṁgaḷu 1472 neya sādhāra
ṇasaṁvatsarada bhādrapada śu 15 śrī
ma(ṁ)nmahārājādhirāja rājaparamē
śvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīsadāśivarāyamahā
rāyaru pruthvīrājyava māḍuta mū
rāja rāmarājayyanavarige nāyakatanake
naḍavāga kanagoṁḍanahaḷiya vīrabhadra
dēvarige sajjyanaśudhasivācāra saṁpa
narāda Ānegoṁdiya kāḍavīranaṁba liṁga
dharanū �yo kanagoṁḍanahaḷiya vīrēśvarage dīpā
rādhanege �yo kanagoṁḍanahaḷi grāmadali liṁgadhāriga
ḷu koḍuvaṁtha liṁgaderigeyanu samarpaṇe māḍi koṭa
kanakagoṁḍanahaḷi vīrēśvaradēvarige liṁgaderige
samarpaṇemāḍi koṭadu dēvaṁ pruthivi
rāyarigū voḍeyaru bhaktarigū pu(ṁ)ṇyavāga
bēkeṁdu koṭaṁthā �yo liṁgaderige dharmaśāsanake
vīraru baṁdu liṁgaderige barasi
nada vīrakali beṭidēva sivācāra kulācārake
rege horagu yeṁdu kanakagoṁḍanahaḷi vīrabha
dradēvarige kanakagoṁḍanahaḷi liṁgaderige samarppaṇeya
māḍi koṭṭaṁta silāśāsana �yo kanagoṁḍanahaḷi
vīrabhadradēvarige �yo Ānegoṁdiya kāḍavīraneṁba
liṁgadharanu samarpaṇe māḍida liṁgaderige Ā ka
nagoṁḍanahaḷi grāmada vokkalu prājegaḷu naḍaśi
koṭadu varuṣa 1 ke ga 2 yeraḍu varaha
varuṣa varuṣau Ācaṁdrārkastāyiyāgi kana
goṁḍanahaḷi vīrēśvaradēvara dīpārādhanege Eraḍu
varahānu koṭu naḍaśi baraluḷavaru �yo Arthake
ru tapidaru taṁma mātapitrugaḷanu vāraṇāsi
yali vadhisida pāpake hōharu yeṁdu
hākisida dharmasilāśāsana .
Digital edition of SII 9.638 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
